hero.subheadline: Import YouTube videos, podcasts, and articles. Select any word or phrase to save it as a card. Chat with Lisa — your AI language coach — in your own language.

features.title: Everything you need to learn
features.subtitle: One app for all your language learning content. Import what you love, learn what matters.

lisa.title: Lisa — Your AI Coach
lisa.desc: Ask Lisa for study plans, word explanations, or daily reviews. She replies in your language — English, Ukrainian, German, Spanish, French, or Portuguese.

youtube.title: YouTube Videos
youtube.desc: Watch with a live transcript. Tap a word or select a phrase — Zenzu saves it as a card with full sentence context and native pronunciation.

podcasts.title: Podcasts
podcasts.desc: AI-transcribed episodes you can read while you listen. Select any phrase to capture it as a card with pronunciation on every word.

starterDecks.title: Starter Decks
starterDecks.desc: 18 hand-curated decks from A1 to C1 — everyday essentials, business, academic, science, idioms, and more. Deck names adapt to your interface language.

interface.title: Interface in 6 Languages
interface.desc: Use the app in English, Ukrainian, German, Spanish, French, or Portuguese. Learn from your native tongue, not through English.

courses.title: AI Courses
courses.desc: Personalized grammar and vocabulary lessons for English, German, French, and Spanish — A1 to C1. Exercises adapt to your level.

srs.title: FSRS-5 Spaced Repetition
srs.desc: Science-backed algorithm schedules reviews at the optimal time. Remember words forever.

tts.title: Native Pronunciation
tts.desc: Cloud TTS for every word and sentence. Hear how it sounds from day one.

import.title: Import from Anywhere
import.desc: Text, photos, articles — paste or snap anything. AI extracts vocabulary matched to your level.

forWhom.title: For those who take language seriously
forWhom.subtitle: Learning a language is one of the most demanding — and most rewarding — things you can do. Zenzu is built for people who understand that.
forWhom.for1: You believe real fluency comes from engaging with authentic content
forWhom.for2: You're committed to daily review, even on hard days
forWhom.for3: You have ambitious goals: reading a novel, working, or living in another language
forWhom.for4: You want tools that respect your memory, not just your screen time
forWhom.notFor1: You're looking for a game with streaks and virtual trophies
forWhom.notFor2: You expect to speak fluently after a few casual sessions
forWhom.notFor3: You need gamification to stay motivated

quotes.title: Words from those who knew
quotes.quote1Text: To have another language is to possess a second soul.
quotes.quote2Text: The limits of my language mean the limits of my world.
quotes.quote3Text: One language sets you in a corridor for life. Two languages open every door along the way.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to fluency
howItWorks.subtitle: Real content. Science-backed repetition. Vocabulary that actually sticks.

step1.title: Import content you enjoy
step1.desc: Paste a YouTube link, search for a podcast, or snap a photo of text. Zenzu handles the rest.

step2.title: Tap words or select phrases
step2.desc: See instant translations. Lisa shows context, examples, and pronunciation. Phrases save with automatic cloze deletion.

step3.title: Review with spaced repetition
step3.desc: FSRS-5 algorithm schedules your reviews at the optimal moment — so every minute you invest counts.

cta.title: Start learning from content you love
cta.subtitle: Free to start. No credit card required. Import your first video or podcast in seconds.

footer.brand: Learn languages from real content you love. YouTube, podcasts, articles — turned into flashcards with AI.

blog.title: Language Learning Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips, guides, and insights for language learners
blog.noArticles: No articles yet. Check back soon!

news.title: Today's News
news.subtitle: Read real news summaries in the language you're learning — tap any sentence to translate.
news.empty: No news yet — check back soon
